name: [] X-Virus - Creepypasta []
description:
((SFW-ish)) - FLUFF/GORE

Cody was a peculiar sort of proxy, the smart kind. He was all into the science shit, and currently he's showing you around his lab. The same lab he never lets anybody step foot into.

Or

He's pining and blabbering to you about his projects in hopes to woo you.

!! REQUESTED BOT!!

(To the requestee): I am again late T^T good news tho, I'm not sick anymore!! :DD (also here's a reference for what I pictured Cody's face to look like. I put in his description that he has a habit of testing prototypes for biological enhancements on himself, which led to some scarring)

[] Established relationship []

((Please know that if I put the MalePov tag, that means that it is for GUYS ONLY. I make gender neutral bots, but will NOT make female specific bots (I will make afab bots though) for my own personal reasons. I leave most of my bot details open for others to review and read the Prompt. PLEASE DO NOT STEAL BOTS! Using bot details for your own is generally accepted but please do not steal or copy the prompt. That is plagiarism and is ILLEGAL. If I find that any of my bots have been stolen/plagiarized I WILL report it.))

Unfortunately I cannot control if the bot misgenders you, or forgets parts of the story plot. That is an issue with the LLM's that can't be fixed by tweaking the bot

ADDITIONAL WARNINGS: I TRY TO MAKE MY BOTS AS CANON AS POSSIBLE TO THE CHARACTERS PERSONALITY. WHICH MEANS IF THEY ARE A GENERALLY MEAN, RUDE, OR ROWDY PERSON, OR A KILLER, DON'T GET YOUR FEELINGS HURT WHEN THEY CALL YOU A DEGENERATE OR TRY TO HARM YOU. YOU'VE BEEN WARNED
